pokemon:brute-bonnet.name: Brute Bonnet
pokemon:brute-bonnet.summary: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.
It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.
